body.title: Memory palace: echo DB tree to lab/theigors/ in repo
body.result: palace_sync.py echoes memory_palace DB to lab/theigors/ as markdown tree with README.md index. Idempotent, orphan cleanup, --dry-run. Initial sync committed (d29e3db0): 32 nodes.
body.description: Script to sync memory_palace DB table to lab/theigors/ directory tree. Each palace node becomes a file at its path. Committed to repo for version history and human readability. Similar pattern to docs_sync.py. Can run anytime after schema exists.
